children.label: A
children.text: the provision of capital, loans, or loan guarantees on terms inconsistent with commercial considerations;

children.label: B
children.text: the provision of goods or services at preferential rates;

children.label: C
children.text: the granting of funds or forgiveness of debt to cover operating losses sustained by a specific industry; and

children.label: D
children.text: the assumption of any costs or expenses of manufacture, production, or distribution;
achievement of increased discipline on export subsidies provided by a foreign government, particularly with respect to agricultural products; and
maintenance of effective remedies against subsidized imports, including, where appropriate, countervailing duties.
